cat_first_integrity.next_target_cat_first_action: 合わない猫と止めるサインを目立たせ、Xでは便利さだけで押しません。
policy: Show fit, not-for, stop-signal, and first-try notes before product links.
Keep direct product links out of X copy unless a guard explicitly allows it.
Treat careful/high-risk candidates as review-before-link even when catbot demand is strong.

steps: Open the live guide for the current target.
Copy one real tracking URL after the guide is waiting.
Confirm the copied URL and dry-run without applying.
Apply and publish only after the dry-run is correct.
